# openwrt_acme_acme (Resource)

Global ACME account settings (UCI: /etc/config/acme, section type: acme). Manages the account e-mail and debug flag shared by all certificates.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_email` (String) Email address associated with the ACME account. Used by the CA to send expiry notices.

### Optional

- `debug` (Boolean) Enable verbose debug logging for ACME operations.
- `id` (String) Name of the section. This name is only used when interacting with UCI directly.
